primary_agent.label: Primary agent
primary_agent.role: Receives the work order, explains it to the user, and asks before execution.

persona_operator_agent.label: Persona or operator agent
persona_operator_agent.role: Reviews voice, content quality, topic choice, and operator behavior.

specialized_engineering_agent.label: Specialized engineering agent
specialized_engineering_agent.role: Edits code, tests, schemas, documentation, deployment scripts, or rollback tooling.

stronger_model.label: Stronger model
stronger_model.role: Handles high-complexity repair or design work after the user chooses to escalate.

human_owner.label: Human owner
human_owner.role: Approves high-risk, durable, public, credential, or production-impacting actions.

work_orders.title: Auto-L3 non-skill promotion from local distillation sources
work_orders.summary: Broad Auto-L3 would promote case, memory and policy lessons from local distillation sources into skills. Minimal-positive mode blocked the export, so this is a local design/regression risk, not a live production incident. Keep regression coverage and repair-ticket wording specific enough that future agents know which route owns each lesson.

source_refs.note: Keep this as policy, not L3 skill export.

delivery.reason: The primary agent is the user's front door for deciding whether to execute, hold, or escalate.

suggested_executor.label: Specialized engineering agent
suggested_executor.reason: The ticket includes code/schema/test scope and concrete acceptance checks.

reasons: The ticket has enough scope to justify a work order.
The ticket represents a real repair candidate.
The ticket includes reproduction commands, acceptance criteria, and edit scope.
Error discovery cost is bounded by local reproduction and acceptance checks.

acceptance_criteria: every exported skill has route_target == skill

escalation.recommended_when: Escalate only if local reproduction exposes broader design risk.

model_handoff.reason: The work order is high risk, broad, or complex enough that a stronger model should be offered before execution. Durable or public effects remain blocked.

work_orders.user_prompt: I received a work order: Auto-L3 non-skill promotion from local distillation sources. Summary: Broad Auto-L3 would promote case, memory and policy lessons from local distillation sources into skills. Minimal-positive mode blocked the export, so this is a local design/regression risk, not a live production incident. Keep regression coverage and repair-ticket wording specific enough that future agents know which route owns each lesson. Suggested executor: Specialized engineering agent. Risk level: medium (local design/regression risk; minimal-positive mode already blocked the bad export). Do you want me to handle it, keep it pending, or hand it to a stronger model?

work_orders.title: Operator quality review for 2026-05-12
work_orders.summary: lower priority for repeated author/thread/topic before the next cycle quality brakes are active; inspect blocks before loosening thresholds

delivery.reason: The primary agent should explain the quality issue and ask whether the persona/operator agent should self-review.

suggested_executor.label: Persona or operator agent
suggested_executor.reason: The issue concerns voice, content quality, topic choice, or operating posture.

reasons: Operational quality is learned from pooled history, not a single cast.
Behavior changes stay behind user choice and do not directly publish.

recommendations: lower priority for repeated author/thread/topic before the next cycle
quality brakes are active; inspect blocks before loosening thresholds
lower priority for repeated author/thread/topic before the next cycle
quality brakes are active; inspect blocks before loosening thresholds

acceptance_criteria: the agent reports the work order to the user before execution
the persona/operator agent proposes changes before durable mutation
high-risk public or memory effects require owner approval

escalation.recommended_when: Escalate if the persona/operator agent cannot explain the quality failure or proposes broad identity changes.

model_handoff.reason: The work order is high risk, broad, or complex enough that a stronger model should be offered before execution. Durable or public effects remain blocked.

work_orders.user_prompt: I received a work order: Operator quality review for 2026-05-12. Summary: lower priority for repeated author/thread/topic before the next cycle quality brakes are active; inspect blocks before loosening thresholds. Suggested executor: Persona or operator agent. Risk level: high (persona/operator behavior can change only after user choice). Do you want me to handle it, keep it pending, or hand it to a stronger model?

warnings: Work orders are routing packets, not automatic execution.
The primary agent must explain the work order and ask the user before acting.
Every suggested executor can be overridden by the user.
